nasb.text: They have dealt treacherously against the Lord, For they have borne illegitimate children. Now the new moon will devour them with their land.

esv.text: They have dealt faithlessly with the Lord; for they have borne alien children. Now the new moon shall devour them with their fields.

cnv.text: 他們以詭詐待耶和華， 因為他們生了私生子。 現在新月要吞滅他們和他們的地業。

ccb.text: 他们对耶和华不忠， 所生的是私生子， 他们和他们的田地必在朔日被吞噬。
